title: Kotappakonda
tagline: Kotappakonda — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Kotappakonda (Telugu: కొటప్పకొండ) is a sacred hill and major Hindu pilgrimage site located in Palnadu district, Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Kotappakonda (Telugu: కొటప్పకొండ) is a sacred hill and major Hindu pilgrimage site located in Palnadu district, Andhra Pradesh, India. It lies about 62 km from Guntur city and 20 km from Narasaraopet. The hill is renowned for the ancient Sri Trikoteswara Swamy Temple, dedicated to Lord Shiva in the form of Trikoteswara (the Lord of the Three Peaks). The temple and the surrounding hills are an important Shaivite center, attracting lakhs of devotees every year.

topPlaces.name: Ellamanda
topPlaces.description: Ellamanda is a village in Palnadu district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Narasaraopet mandal of Narasaraopet revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Kavuru
topPlaces.description: Kavuru is a village in Palnadu district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the headquarters of Chilakaluripet mandal in Narasaraopet revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Kopperapalem
topPlaces.description: Kopperapalem village is located in Ballikurava mandal of Bapatla district, Andhra Pradesh, India

topPlaces.name: Santhamaguluru
topPlaces.description: Santhamaguluru is a village in the Prakasam district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is under the jurisdiction of the Santhamaguluru Mandal within the Addanki revenue division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kotappakonda?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kotappakonda is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Vijayawada Airport (92 km) and the nearest railway station is Guntur Junction (47 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kotappakonda?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kotappakonda at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kotappakonda?
faq.a: Stays in Kotappakonda start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kotappakonda?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ellamanda, Kavuru, Kopperapalem, Santhamaguluru.
